tools.name: webReader
tools.description: Fetch and Convert URL to Large Model Friendly Input.

url.description: The URL of the website to fetch and read

timeout.description: Request timeout(unit is second), default is 20

return_format.description: Reader response content type (markdown or text), default is markdown

no_gfm.description: Disable GitHub Flavored Markdown (true/false), default is false

keep_img_data_url.description: Keep image data URL (true/false), default is false

with_images_summary.description: Include images summary (true/false), default is false

with_links_summary.description: Include links summary (true/false), default is false
